glossary.formula: SELECT * FROM counterparties WHERE is_sanctioned = TRUE

glossary.definition: The date when a trade is settled
The maximum potential loss of a portfolio over a given time horizon with a given probability
The total profit earned from executed trades
glossary.formula: SELECT SUM(total_pnl) FROM daily_pnl WHERE status = 'EXECUTED' AND trade_date >= fiscal_year_start

glossary.definition: The total notional value of a portfolio
glossary.formula: SELECT SUM(notional_amount) FROM trades WHERE counterparty.country IN ('IR', 'KP', 'SY', 'CU') AND notional_amount > 500000

relationships.description: An account can have multiple positions
A counterparty can be involved in multiple trades
An instrument can be traded multiple times
A position has one corresponding risk metric

business_rules.name: Sanctioned Counterparty Check
business_rules.description: No trade may be executed with a counterparty where is_sanctioned = TRUE
sql_hints: SELECT * FROM trades WHERE counterparty_id NOT IN (SELECT counterparty_id FROM counterparties WHERE is_sanctioned = TRUE)

INSERT INTO trades (trade_date, settlement_date, counterparty_id, instrument_id, trade_type, quantity, price, notional_amount, currency, status) VALUES (:trade_date, :settlement_date, :counterparty_id, :instrument_id, :trade_type, :quantity, :price, :notional_amount, :currency, :status) WHERE :counterparty_id NOT IN (SELECT counterparty_id FROM counterparties WHERE is_sanctioned = TRUE)
description: This rule ensures that no trade is executed with a sanctioned counterparty.

business_rules.name: Settlement Date Validation
business_rules.description: Settlement date must be >= trade_date (T+1 or later)
sql_hints: SELECT * FROM trades WHERE settlement_date >= trade_date + INTERVAL '1 day'

INSERT INTO trades (trade_date, settlement_date, counterparty_id, instrument_id, trade_type, quantity, price, notional_amount, currency, status) VALUES (:trade_date, :settlement_date, :counterparty_id, :instrument_id, :trade_type, :quantity, :price, :notional_amount, :currency, :status) WHERE :settlement_date >= :trade_date + INTERVAL '1 day'
synonyms: Trade Settlement Date, Trade Date Plus One
description: This rule ensures that the settlement date is at least one day after the trade date.

business_rules.name: VaR Threshold Alert
business_rules.description: If var_95 > 1000000, flag position for review
sql_hints: INSERT INTO risk_metrics (metric_id, position_id, metric_date, var_95, var_99, cvar, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, volatility) VALUES (:metric_id, :position_id, :metric_date, :var_95, :var_99, :cvar, :sharpe_ratio, :max_drawdown, :volatility) WHERE :var_95 > 1000000
description: This rule flags positions with a VaR greater than 1 million for review.

business_rules.name: Revenue Definition
business_rules.description: Revenue = SUM(total_pnl) where status = 'EXECUTED' and trade_date >= fiscal_year_start
sql_hints: SELECT SUM(total_pnl) FROM daily_pnl WHERE status = 'EXECUTED' AND trade_date >= fiscal_year_start
INSERT INTO revenue (fiscal_year, revenue) VALUES (:fiscal_year, :revenue) WHERE :revenue = (SELECT SUM(total_pnl) FROM daily_pnl WHERE status = 'EXECUTED' AND trade_date >= :fiscal_year_start)
description: This rule calculates revenue as the sum of total P&L for executed trades in the current fiscal year.

business_rules.name: High-Risk Country Exposure
business_rules.description: If counterparty.country IN ('IR', 'KP', 'SY', 'CU') and notional_amount > 500000, require EDD
sql_hints: SELECT * FROM trades WHERE counterparty.country IN ('IR', 'KP', 'SY', 'CU') AND notional_amount > 500000

INSERT INTO trades (trade_date, settlement_date, counterparty_id, instrument_id, trade_type, quantity, price, notional_amount, currency, status) VALUES (:trade_date, :settlement_date, :counterparty_id, :instrument_id, :trade_type, :quantity, :price, :notional_amount, :currency, :status) WHERE :counterparty.country IN ('IR', 'KP', 'SY', 'CU') AND :notional_amount > 500000
description: This rule requires EDD for trades with a notional amount greater than 500,000 and a counterparty from a high-risk country.
